2.label: Boost Two Traits
2.description: Gain a +1 bonus to two unmarked character traits and mark them.

2.label: Hit Point Slot
2.description: Gain one additional Hit Point slot.

2.label: Boost Two Experiences
2.description: Gain a +1 bonus to two Experiences.

2.label: Extra Domain Card
2.description: Take an additional domain card of your level or lower.

2.label: Evasion
2.description: Gain a +1 bonus to your Evasion.

2.label: Proficiency
2.description: Gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency. (Costs both advancements.)

3.label: Evasion

3.label: Multiclass
3.description: Choose an additional class and one of its domains. (Costs both advancements.)

3.label: Proficiency
3.description: Gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency. (Costs both advancements.)
